place: Samsara Estate, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Hillside Five-Bedroom Villa with Private Elevator over Nakalay Bay — Kamala
note: Private chef · beach shuttle · airport transfer
blurb: A five-bedroom villa set forty metres above the sea in Kamala's Samsara Estate, its rooms following the hillside for uninterrupted views over Nakalay Bay and the Andaman. A 12-metre infinity pool, sauna and steam rooms, private elevator and library sit across some 995 m², with a private chef and beach shuttle, sleeping up to ten.
detail:
Set forty metres above the sea within Kamala's exclusive Samsara Estate, this five-bedroom villa steps down the hillside so that nearly every room holds an uninterrupted view over Nakalay Bay, Patong Bay and the open Andaman. The design follows the natural slope, with a private elevator linking the levels.

A 12-metre infinity pool reaches toward the water, with indoor and outdoor dining, an outdoor BBQ and a sound system laid out for long evenings. Inside, across roughly 995 m², a master and four guest bedrooms are joined by a family room, a spacious library, and a fully equipped kitchen.

Wellness is built into the house — a sauna and steam room for after the beach — and the whole villa is wired with high-speed WiFi and covered parking for two cars.

A private chef and housekeeper look after the day-to-day, with a complimentary twice-daily shuttle to Kamala and Patong beaches, one return airport transfer, turndown service and 24-hour estate security included; a baby cot and high chair are available on request.

features.l: 12 m infinity pool forty metres above the sea
